title: Imports Control (Importation of Charitable Gifts without Licence) Notice, 1971
title_en: Imports Control (Importation of Charitable Gifts without Licence) Notice, 1971

provisions.content: This Notice may be cited as the Imports Control (Importation of Charitable Gifts without Licence) Notice.

The goods specified in the Schedule to this Notice are hereby permitted to be imported without import licence. Schedule Foodstuffs, clothing and medical supplies consigned as gifts to any Missionary Society approved by the Minister for Finance under the Customs Tariff (Remission of Customs Duties) Order 1 or to the Tanzania Red Cross Society or to any other charitable society, and in respect of which the Commissioner of Customs and Excise is satisfied that they are intended for free distribution or for use by the consignee for relief operations. 1 G.N.
